name: Peanut Butter Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar, margarine, milk, and chocolate chips. Cook for 30 seconds.
2. Pour the mixture into the prepared graham cracker crust. Chill for 30 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the butter, powdered sugar, peanut butter, and cream cheese until smooth.
4. Gently fold in the whipped cream, ensuring there are swirls of whipped cream visible throughout.
5. Carefully pour the mixture into the chilled pie shell.
